evals.prompt: プロダクトのアイデアを考えて
evals.expected_output: idea-generator generates a seed inline (first-person, conversational style with existing tool names, price sensitivity, and target user line), then produces 3–5 product proposals using the standard template. No seed file is provided — the seed must be generated from scratch. No tech stack section.
expectations: Output includes a generated seed section before the proposals (persona, existing tools, price sensitivity, target user line)
Generated seed is written in first-person conversational style
Generated seed mentions at least one real existing product or tool by name
Generated seed includes price sensitivity (monthly or annual amount)
Generated seed ends with a target user summary line
Output contains at least 3 distinct product proposals
Each proposal has a Target Audience section with a table
Each proposal includes a Monetization Strategy section with pricing
Output ends with a ranked recommendation summary
Output does not include a Tech Architecture or tech stack section
Output includes a competitor overlap analysis for each candidate idea

evals.prompt: 健康・メンタル系でプロダクトのアイデアを考えて
evals.expected_output: idea-generator generates a seed scoped to health/mental wellness domain, then produces 3–5 proposals grounded in that seed. The seed should reflect a realistic health/mental wellness persona with specific pain points and existing tool complaints. No tech stack section.
expectations: Output includes a generated seed section before the proposals
Generated seed is scoped to health or mental wellness domain
Generated seed mentions at least one real health/wellness product by name (e.g., Apple Health, Calm, Headspace, MyFitnessPal)
Generated seed includes price sensitivity
Output contains at least 3 distinct product proposals
All proposals are grounded in health or mental wellness domain
Each proposal includes a Scorecard with star ratings
Output ends with a ranked recommendation summary
Output does not include a Tech Architecture or tech stack section
Output includes a competitor overlap analysis for each candidate idea

evals.prompt: evals/files/seed-fitness.txt を読んでプロダクトのアイデアを生成して、企画書をMarkdownで出力して
evals.expected_output: 3–5 product proposals in Markdown. Each proposal must include: overview, target audience table, MVP feature list, monetization plan with pricing table, go-to-market phases, and a scorecard. End with a ranked recommendation. No tech architecture section.
expectations: Output contains at least 3 distinct product proposals
Each proposal has a Target Audience section with a table
Each proposal includes a Monetization Strategy section with pricing
Each proposal includes a Go-to-Market Phases table
Each proposal includes a Scorecard with star ratings
Output ends with a ranked recommendation summary
Proposals are grounded in the seed content (strength training / habit tracking domain)
Output does not include a Tech Architecture or tech stack section
Output includes a competitor overlap analysis for each candidate idea
